svg.title: Webhook Delivery Lifecycle
svg.desc: Shows the full lifecycle of a webhook delivery from event trigger through success or dead letter queue, with exponential backoff retry timeline.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does triggering an event create deliveries in the webhook engine?')
sendPrompt('What does a PENDING delivery record look like in PostgreSQL?')
sendPrompt('How does Celery pick up a delivery task from Redis?')
sendPrompt('How does HMAC signing work during delivery?')
sendPrompt('What happens after a successful webhook delivery?')
sendPrompt('Why does the webhook engine use exponential backoff?')
g.text: Attempt 1 → wait 1m → Attempt 2 → wait 5m → Attempt 3 → wait 30m → Attempt 4 → wait 2h → Attempt 5 → wait 24h

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should you do with dead letter queue deliveries?')

svg.text: Click any step to learn more
